rationale: No qualitative change for Poland this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved (energy price uncertainty continues), war in Ukraine unchanged; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran casts doubt
top_events.summary: A signed Iran deal could ease global oil/gas prices, indirectly reducing Poland's energy costs. But Tehran's contradiction means no resolution yet — uncertainty continues.

top_events.title: Israel attacks Lebanon as Iran deal talks continue
top_events.summary: Renewed Israeli strikes on Lebanon add regional instability that could affect oil markets and energy prices relevant to Poland, but no direct impact on Polish daily life.

top_events.title: EU migration debate: rival marches in Rome, new EU migration rules
top_events.summary: Ongoing EU-wide migration policy debate has indirect relevance for Poland as an EU member managing eastern border pressure, but no new policy change enacted.
